'''Sakins''' was the [[Presider]] of [[Vannix]] until the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]. When word reached Vannix that the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] had [[Battle of Coruscant (Yuuzhan Vong War)|conquered]] [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], Sakins decided to flee the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] with his family and mistresses, but not without looting the planetary treasury, leaving Vannix essentially bankrupt.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Enemy Lines II: Rebel Stand]]'' {{1stm}}
